name: Amazon Spider Solitaire
author: Poki
description: Amazon Spider Solitaire takes the classic card game Spider Solitaire and gives it a wild jungle twist! Immerse yourself in a lush jungle setting as you organize cards in sequence, racing against the clock. Strategize your moves to rack up higher scores, and if you find yourself stuck, don’t hesitate to follow the hint to move on. Ready to conquer the jungle of cards? How to play Amazon Spider Solitaire? Click to select a card and drag to move it! Who created Amazon Spider Solitaire? Amazon Spider Solitaire is created by Chill Pill. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Amazon Spider Solitaire for free? You can play Amazon Spider Solitaire for free on Poki. Can I play Amazon Spider Solitaire on mobile devices and desktop? Amazon Spider Solitaire can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
